source_pr.title: test: fix unstable test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: xiongjiwei <xiongjiwei1996@outlook.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/37891

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: TestConcurrentDDLSwitch sometimes checked for DDL jobs too early (before the jobs were persisted/visible), leading to intermittent failures.
failure_signature: Flaky due to DDL job visibility/persistence timing (jobs not yet in table when test starts checking).
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because DDL job state is updated asynchronously: the goroutine submits DDL work and the test begins polling before the jobs are reliably persisted/visible. This PR stabilizes it by adding a short sleep (2s) to give the DDL jobs time to be inserted into the job table before the ticker-based checking starts.
fix_pattern: Add synchronization/wait before asserting DDL job state (here via a short sleep to avoid checking the job table too early).
analysis:

Triage summary: test: fix unstable test
